Module com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida
Package com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller

Class WinController

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.WinController
public class WinController extends Object
Controller for the Win screen. Manages the animated sequence showing the victory image, displays a congratulations message, and provides options to play again or return to the main menu.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Juan JosÃ© Morera GÃ³mez

  • Constructor Details

    • WinController

      public WinController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the Win screen controller. Loads audio resources, sets all UI elements to invisible, plays the win sound, and starts an animated sequence: the victory image fades in, pauses, fades out, then the congratulations message and buttons fade in.
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • GameController.validateAndSave()
      • GameController.onTimeUp()

    • handlePlayAgain

      private void handlePlayAgain()
      Initializes the Win screen controller. Loads audio resources, sets all UI elements to invisible, plays the win sound, and starts an animated sequence: the victory image fades in, pauses, fades out, then the congratulations message and buttons fade in.
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • GameController.validateAndSave()
      • GameController.onTimeUp()

    • handleMenu

      private void handleMenu()
      Handles the Main Menu button click event. Plays the button sound and navigates back to the main menu scene.
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • GameStage.loadScene(String)
